study: gap_and_go generalization — frequency (drop gap) / concentration / regime

headline: NO SURVIVORS across all three variant families. V1 (drop the gap, the frequency lever): DEAD on the entire grid — best point V1_strongbar_rm1.2_loc0.5_body0.4 n=86 (vs gap-and-go n=84) but ATM exp=$+18.2 (vs +$41.6), DSR only WEAK, drop-top5 NEGATIVE, quarters <=50%. The GAP is doing real, irreplaceable work — the tight first-bar stop ALONE (no gap) does not reproduce the edge at scale, so frequency cannot be multiplied this way. V2 (gap-size concentration): both buckets DEAD on the ATM default tier — the small-gap (0.25-0.5%) bucket's apparent pass was a THIN-SLICE artifact (carried by a 13-trade 100%-WR put cluster; calls ~flat), the large-gap (0.5%+) bucket fails drop-top5 + quarters at ATM. V3 (regime gates): DEAD — prior-trend-align dilutes the edge, and vix-rising/both collapse to tiny NEGATIVE samples. VERDICT: gap-and-go is necessarily low-frequency; ship nothing — the proven edge stays as-is. (A false edge shipped would lose real money.)

verdict_summary.reason: zero survivors on the live config under the brutal-on-overfit OP-22 bar
